feature.name: Session token registry
feature.description: Extract VibeShop session registration, resolution, and revocation as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: register sessions and return opaque tokens
resolve sessions by normalized token strings
revoke sessions and remove ids from GLOBAL_STATE
store user_id and metadata payloads in SessionStore
excluded_behaviors: Flask-ish routes and HTTP cookie handling
original project tests and CLI entrypoints

entanglement.description: Session resolution is split across registry, store, and token helpers with duplicate utils shortcuts and GLOBAL_STATE session bookkeeping.
signals: two similarly named session lookup helpers with incorrect semantics
register appends session ids to GLOBAL_STATE sessions list
token normalization required for case/whitespace-insensitive lookup

output.signature: SessionRegistry.register(user_id: str, *, metadata: dict | None = None) -> str
